description: Use this API to replicate machine parametric data from the working case in the form of a machine impedance data file. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = rwma(sid, all, status, out, ofile)
python_syntax: ierr = rwma(sid, all, status, out, ofile)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying control options. (input).

parameters.name: ofile
parameters.description: Output filename (when out is 0). (input; no default allowed).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

status.description: include records for out-of-service machines (0 by default).
used when calculating P fractions (0 by default).
used when calculating Q fractions (0 by default).

out.description: direct output to a data file specified by OFILE.
direct output to the current report device.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
